CREATE TABLE test_fisher (d1 Float64, d2 Float64);
SELECT randFisherF(10, 3) AS f_value, randFisherF(5, 2) AS f_value2 FROM numbers(10);
WITH (SELECT avg(randFisherF(10, 3)) FROM numbers(100)) AS avg_value SELECT avg_value, randFisherF(20, 10) FROM numbers(5);
SELECT A.d1, A.d2, randFisherF(A.d1, A.d2) AS f_value FROM (SELECT d1, d2 FROM test_fisher WHERE d1 > 0 AND d2 > 0) AS A;
SELECT randFisherF(0.1, 0.1), randFisherF(1.5, 2.5) FROM numbers(5) UNION ALL SELECT randFisherF(1.0, 1.0), randFisherF(0.0, 3.0) FROM numbers(5);
CREATE TABLE random_results AS SELECT randFisherF(d1, d2) AS f_result FROM test_fisher;
INSERT INTO random_results SELECT randFisherF(100, 200) AS f_result FROM numbers(10);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM random_results WHERE f_result > 1;
